title: onobrychis bornmuelleri
intro: Onobrychis bornmuelleri, also known as Bornmueller's Spanish clover, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Onobrychis bornmuelleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
